pass_criteria: OpenNort works without the adapter installed.
The adapter returns evidence; it does not own final truth.
The adapter cannot change hypotheses, metrics, thresholds, or split definitions.
fail_criteria: Adapter installation becomes required for basic skill use.
Adapter output bypasses Evidence Tribunal review.
Adapter changes the approved plan without a new checkpoint.
negative_controls: Adapter required for normal skill use.
Adapter output that changes approved hypotheses, metrics, thresholds, or split definitions.
Adapter output accepted as final truth without Evidence Tribunal review.
